Index

Modules: collect_and_fill, ggplot_drawing, ggplot_scales, ggplot_styles, ggplot_theme, ggplot_ticks, ggplot_types, ggplot_utils, ggplot_vega, ggplotnim, postprocess_scales, viridisRaw.

API symbols

`$`:
  • ggplot_types: `$`(aes: Aesthetics): string
  • ggplot_types: `$`(f: Facet): string

`%`:
  • ggplotnim: `%`(t: tuple): json.JsonNode

  • ggplotnim: `+`(p: GgPlot; annot: Annotation): GgPlot
